phonetic: 藞ski藧d蕭蓴藧r瑟艐; 藢ski藧藞d蕭蓴藧r瑟艐
phoneticUs: 藞ski藧d蕭蓴藧r瑟艐; 藢ski藧藞d蕭蓴藧r瑟艐
examples: In both sports, an animal pulls the athlete (in skijoring, it's dogs or a horse towing a person on skis), not the other way around.
The race card at each meeting features flat racing, winter-style trotting and the local speciality, skijoring -- an awkward combination of horse, human and skis which is a clear crowd favorite.
